_howto: ADD AN APP (manual, by design — there is no admin page):
1. Add an entry to "apps" below (copy the template object).
3. Run Prompts 3-5 for the app's legal (privacy + terms) and detail pages.
4. Add the new URLs to sitemap.xml.
5. git push.  (The 'save' action on GitHub Pages is a git commit.)
NOTE: privacy + terms pages are ALWAYS static HTML — never rendered from this file.

apps.name: App One
apps.tagline: A small, sharp, genuinely useful app for iOS and Android.
apps.description: A short, two-line description of what this app does and who it's for.

features.title: Fast and focused
features.text: Opens instantly and does one job well, with no clutter and nothing to learn.

features.title: Private by default
features.text: Your data stays on your device. No accounts, no tracking, no ads.

features.title: Made with care
features.text: Built and maintained by a one-person studio that actually replies to email.

apps.name: Sprout
apps.tagline: Scan any plant, get its whole story.
apps.description: Point your camera at a plant for a beautiful care card + gentle watering reminders. No account.

features.title: Instant ID
features.text: Snap a plant and get its name + full care card in seconds.

features.title: Gentle reminders
features.text: Calm, per-plant watering nudges — supportive, never naggy.

features.title: Beautiful cards
features.text: Editorial care cards you'll actually want to screenshot and share.

apps.name: Approved
apps.tagline: Passport photos that pass — before you pay.
apps.description: Snap a selfie, get a perfectly sized passport or visa photo. Every rule checked, on your device.

features.title: The Compliance Coach
features.text: Every rule shown as a green tick or amber flag, with a plain-language reason and a fix.

features.title: Your photo stays yours
features.text: Processed on-device, checked once by AI, never used for training, no account, no tracking.

features.title: File + print sheet
features.text: Exact-spec digital photo plus a 4×6 and A4 sheet with cut lines for any photo shop.
